## Description

Include a summary of the change, relevant motivation, and context.

Fixes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Tooling or CI update

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual tests
- [ ] `npm run check:all`
- [ ] `npm run test:cov`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] I have added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I have updated documentation when needed.
- [ ] I have considered security impact for protocol, storage, IPC, mDNS, or unlock changes.
- [ ] Logs do not expose secrets, full tokens, full signatures, or private keys.
